metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for Overthink — sorted into four use-case buckets: schema-kind authoring, contributor internals, runtime CLI verbs, and deployable images.

plugins.name: ov-core
plugins.description: Runtime/lifecycle CLI verbs — start, stop, restart, ov-status, logs, shell, ssh, deploy, ov-update, remove, ov-config, cmd, ov-version, ov-doctor.

plugins.name: ov-build
plugins.description: Build/authoring CLI verbs — build, generate, list, inspect, merge, new, pull, validate, secrets, settings, migrate, ov-mcp-cmd.

plugins.name: ov-eval
plugins.description: Live-container evaluation and probe verbs — `ov eval` orchestrator + per-protocol live probes (cdp, wl, wl-overlay, dbus, vnc, spice, libvirt, record).

plugins.name: ov-automation
plugins.description: Automation/customization knobs — tmux verb, host-side wrappers (alias, udev), topic flags (encryption, sidecars, openclaw deployment).

plugins.name: ov-image
plugins.description: Schema authoring reference for `kind: image` and `kind: layer` — image.yml/layer.yml composition, task verbs, validation.

plugins.name: ov-vm
plugins.description: Schema authoring reference for `kind: vm` + bootc VM catalog — libvirt/QEMU backends, cloud_image vs bootc sources.

plugins.name: ov-kubernetes
plugins.description: Schema authoring for `kind: k8s` — Kustomize manifests + cluster probes via `ov eval k8s`.

plugins.name: ov-local
plugins.description: Schema authoring for `kind: local` — local templates, ssh-host targets, managed ssh-config fragment.

plugins.name: ov-pod
plugins.description: Schema authoring for `kind: pod` and `kind: deploy` — deploy.yml shapes, nested deploys, sidecars.

plugins.name: ov-internals
plugins.description: Development internals for ov contributors — Go source map, install-plan IR, capabilities/OCI labels, vm-spec, libvirt/cloud-init renderers, cutover-policy, strict-policy, disposable, ovmf, generate-source. Ships enforcement agents and the github MCP server.

plugins.name: ov-distros
plugins.description: Base OS images and hardware runtime — arch, fedora, debian, ubuntu, aurora, bazzite-ai, GPU runtime (nvidia/cuda/rocm), bootc bootstrap, per-distro builders.

plugins.name: ov-languages
plugins.description: Programming language runtimes and package managers — python, python-ml, pixi (others like golang/rust/nodejs live in `ov-coder`).

plugins.name: ov-infrastructure
plugins.description: Infrastructure services and system layers — postgresql, redis, valkey, vectorchord, k3s cluster, traefik, supervisord, tailscale, gocryptfs, virtualization, dbus-layer, tmux-layer.

plugins.name: ov-tools
plugins.description: CLI utilities and the ov binary deploy artifacts — ripgrep, himalaya, whisper, nano-pdf, summarize, ordercli, gogcli, sherpa-onnx, plus the `ov`/`ov-full` binary deployment skills.

plugins.name: ov-jupyter
plugins.description: Self-contained skills + MCP wiring for the jupyter image family (jupyter, jupyter-ml, jupyter-ml-notebook, unsloth-studio). Ships the jupyter MCP server (port 8888).

plugins.name: ov-coder
plugins.description: Self-contained skills + MCP wiring for ov coder/dev images (arch-coder, debian-coder, fedora-coder, ubuntu-coder, arch-ov). Ships the ov MCP server (port 18765). Bundles language runtimes (golang, rust, nodejs).

plugins.name: ov-selkies
plugins.description: Self-contained skills + MCP wiring for the selkies-desktop family (Wayland desktop in a container with VNC + Chrome). Ships the chrome-devtools MCP server (port 9224).

plugins.name: ov-openclaw
plugins.description: Self-contained skills + MCP wiring for the openclaw image family (multi-variant AI workstation: bootc, full, ml, sway, ollama, browser). Ships the chrome-devtools MCP server (port 9224) on chrome-shipping variants.

plugins.name: ov-versa
plugins.description: Self-contained skills + MCP wiring for the versa image — a marimo notebook environment (marimo + Airflow + OSM/GTFS analytics + martin vector tiles + five PMTiles generation pipelines: tippecanoe / gpq-tiles / DuckDB ST_AsMVT / DuckDB → freestiler / Shortbread-via-Tilemaker, plus PMTiles Viewer SPA on port 28001 + VersaTiles Frontend on port 28002 + versatiles serve as second tile server on port 28090). Ships marimo (port 22718) and airflow (port 29999) MCP servers.

plugins.name: ov-ollama
plugins.description: Self-contained skills for running the ollama LLM-server image. Pair with ov-jupyter to expose Ollama models to Jupyter notebooks via the jupyter MCP.

plugins.name: ov-openwebui
plugins.description: Self-contained skills for the openwebui chat-frontend image. Consumes the jupyter MCP server (enable ov-jupyter alongside) for in-chat code execution.

plugins.name: ov-comfyui
plugins.description: Self-contained skills for running the comfyui image-generation/diffusion image.

plugins.name: ov-immich
plugins.description: Self-contained skills for the immich photo-management image (immich + immich-ml variants).

plugins.name: ov-hermes
plugins.description: Self-contained skills for the hermes agent image (hermes + hermes-playwright variants). Consumes the jupyter MCP server for notebook manipulation — enable ov-jupyter alongside.

plugins.name: ov-filebrowser
plugins.description: Self-contained skills for the filebrowser image (web-based file management on top of an ov volume).
